ddls:
CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which crime data is collected */,
  "is_current_year" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the year is the current year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the year entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the year entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the crime category is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the crime category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the crime category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime statistic entry */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year for which the statistic is recorded */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crime category */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of incidents for the specified crime category in the given year */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the person or agency reporting the statistic */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the crime statistic was reported */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the crime statistic entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the crime statistic entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES crime_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jurisdictions" (
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jurisdiction */,
  "jurisdiction_name" TEXT /* Name of the jurisdiction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the jurisdiction */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the jurisdiction */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the jurisdiction in square kilometers */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the jurisdiction is currently active and reporting data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the jurisdiction entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the jurisdiction entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jurisdiction_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime statistic entry */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year for which the statistic is recorded */,
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the jurisdiction */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crime category */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of incidents for the specified crime category in the given year and jurisdiction */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the person or agency reporting the statistic */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the jurisdiction-specific crime statistic was reported */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the jurisdiction statistic entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the jurisdiction statistic entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jurisdiction_statistics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jurisdiction_statistics_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES crime_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jurisdiction_statistics_jurisdiction_id FOREIGN KEY ("jurisdiction_id") REFERENCES jurisdictions ("jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., law enforcement, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
